## Project Details
- **Type**: Next.js Travel/Tourism Website (DMC-inspired)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Framework**: Next.js 14+ with App Router
- **Features**: 
  - Multi-page layout (Home, Destinations, Packages, About, Contact)
  - Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
  - Contact forms
  - Package listings
  - Destination showcase

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js with TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Build Tool**: Next.js built-in
- **Package Manager**: npm
